channel.title: R on Karl Tayeb
channel.description: Recent content in R on Karl Tayeb

item.title: Home
item.description: Hello I’m Karl Tayeb, a 3rd year PhD student in the Committee of Genetics, Genomics, and Systems biology and the University of Chicago. I have the privilege of being advised by Matthew Stephens and Yoav Gilad. This is my personal/research website. I’ve started this site with the goal of “working with the garage door open”. While the exact scope of what I post is still up in the air I aim for this site to contain a mix of research notes, teaching materials, and references posts.
